description_long: This armchair features a boxy, robust frame with thick, rounded armrests and a high, gently curved backrest. The upholstery is a textured, woven fabric in a warm reddish-brown tone, giving it a cozy and inviting appearance. A single, large, light gray cushion is placed against the backrest, providing additional comfort and visual contrast. The seat is wide and deep, designed for relaxation, and the armrests are fully padded and upholstered for extra support. The base of the chair is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy construction. The overall design is modern yet comfortable, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A boxy, reddish-brown upholstered armchair with thick, rounded armrests and a high backrest, featuring a contrasting gray cushion. The chair has a solid base with no visible legs and a textured fabric finish.
description_view_0: Side-rear view showing the thick, rounded armrest and the high, curved backrest with the textured reddish-brown upholstery.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, large gray cushion, and the full, padded armrests.
description_view_2: Angled front view displaying the seat depth, armrest thickness, and the contrast between the gray cushion and reddish-brown fabric.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tall, curved backrest and the continuous, solid base with textured upholstery.
attribute_armrest_design: thick, rounded, padded and fully upholstered
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, solid base to the floor
